name: dev-workflow
description: OpenSpec-style spec-driven development workflow for Codex with integrated planning, review, and PR workflows.

interface.longDescription: Use Dev Workflow in Codex for OpenSpec-style change proposals, guided implementation, multi-agent code review, archive operations, test generation, and PR preparation without changing the existing Claude Code plugin.
defaultPrompt: Create a dev-workflow proposal for this feature
Run the dev-workflow code review workflow
Apply the next tasks from the active dev-workflow change
